name: hus-ai-os
description: HUSAI-OS 2.0 — Autonomous AI Company / Zero Manual Work platform

scripts.build:all: npm run build:dashboard && npm run build:restaurant && npm run build:trading && npm run build:dropshipping
scripts.test:all: npm run test --prefix restaurant-os && npm run test --prefix trading-ai && npm run test --prefix dropshipping-research && npm run test --prefix husai-dashboard
